summary.intent: Build a fully interactive browser-in-browser feature for the moltis platform, allowing users to create, view, and interact with sandboxed browser sessions from the UI, with session history and action logging.
summary.outcome: Delivered a working interactive browser viewer with shared manager between tool and UI, CDP screencast relay, click/scroll/keyboard input, URL autocomplete, session persistence to SQLite, and action logging — though the session history UI was still being built at transcript end.

repo: BrowserTool and RealBrowserService previously had separate BrowserManager instances; sessions created by the tool were invisible to the UI's API until shared via Arc<OnceCell>

The v4 WebSocket protocol requires clients to explicitly subscribe to event types via subscriptions list in websocket.js — missing 'browser.screencast.frame' caused silent frame drops via broadcast.rs filter at line 100-102

CDP Page.startScreencast relay task exits immediately when tx.send() has zero receivers; serde's #[serde(default)] handles missing fields but not explicit null — LLMs send null for all optional params
CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent with mouseWheel type requires BOTH deltaX and deltaY always present (even if 0), or it rejects the event
Screencast metadata offset_top must be added to y-coordinates for correct click mapping; canvas clientWidth/clientHeight (not getBoundingClientRect) gives inside-border dimensions
Browser sessions were launched at 2560x1440@2x viewport by default — causing layout issues, off-center captchas, and poor interactive UX; 1440x900@1x is the right default for interactive viewing
Rapidly stopping/starting screencasts on session switch causes Chrome CDP connection death; screencasts should run continuously and frame listeners filter by session_id instead
GatewayServices.session_store is a different field from the new browser session store — replace_all operations risk collisions with coincidentally named fields
Container idle timeout (5 min) and hard TTL (30 min) were too aggressive for interactive browser sessions; increased to 30 min idle and 2 hour TTL

code.finding: Relay task exits on tx.send() with zero receivers — should continue dropping frames until subscribers arrive
obj.retain(|_, v| !v.is_null()) strips null values before serde deserialization to handle LLM behavior of sending null for all optional fields
pool.get_or_create with existing session_id returns immediately without checking sandbox mode — no new session spawned on navigate
validate_url() only allowed http/https schemes, rejecting about:blank which is needed for new session creation
Event subscription list (used by broadcast.rs filter) was missing 'browser.screencast.frame' — all screencast frames silently dropped
useEffect with empty deps runs before canvas is conditionally rendered — ref callback pattern required to attach event listeners when canvas DOM element appears
Broadcast has a subscription filter — events not in client's subscription list are silently dropped
RealBrowserService.request() calls session_id and sandbox injection but didn't strip nulls; default sandbox mode needed for UI-initiated requests

workflow: Adding diagnostic logging at every stage of an async relay chain (CDP → registry → service → WS) is the right approach when frames disappear silently
Integration tests with #[ignore] for host browser tests require --test-threads=1 to avoid profile lock conflicts between parallel test instances
Playwright e2e tests for browser-in-browser features can verify canvas visibility and URL normalization without requiring actual CDP frame delivery
YubiKey git signing requires interactive tap — background push tasks will fail and need retry; don't amend, just retry push
When replace_all editing shared field names across a large file, verify no coincidental name collisions with unrelated fields first

friction: YubiKey signing required multiple manual taps mid-session, blocking push workflows repeatedly
CDP mouseWheel event silently fails without both deltaX and deltaY — not obvious from the CDP docs, discovered via test failure
GatewayServices.session_store field name collision caused a silent bug when using replace_all for the new browser session store field
db_pool is created after browser service in server.rs initialization order, requiring OnceCell deferred initialization pattern to wire the session store
sqlx::SqlitePool cannot be referenced in service-traits crate (no sqlx dep), requiring the set_session_store method to be on the concrete type rather than the trait
Rapid stop/start of screencasts on session switch caused Chrome CDP connection death — debugging required multiple rounds of log analysis
open_items: Session history UI (closed sessions list, action log viewer, screenshot timeline) was being built at transcript end — not yet committed
Binary WebSocket frames for screencast (eliminates ~33% base64 overhead) was identified but not implemented
WebRTC upgrade path (neko architecture, VP8/VP9 encoding, sub-100ms latency) identified as long-term direction but deferred
Per-agent browser profiles for isolation — currently single global profile dir for all sessions
Browser session action log should capture screenshots on navigation events for video-like replay — JSONL + periodic screenshots planned but not implemented
Chrome process crash recovery — a single CDP failure can still kill sessions; retry logic added but root cause of container memory pressure not addressed
PR not created — branch plan-browser-viewing-HOHno has all changes but was not merged at session end
